THE MOTION WAS PREVIOUSLY CONTINUED FROM SEPTEMBER 23, 2013 TO OCTOBER 23, 2013 FOR LACK OF COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS AS REQUIRED BY LOCAL RULE 6.2B. THE MATTER WAS THEN TAKEN OFF CALENDAR ON OCTOBER 23, 2013 FOR NON-COMPLIANCE WITH THE COURT'S ORDER TO PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THE MOVING PAPERS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-06-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT RODRICK FOODS, INC.'s motion to strike the request for punitive damages on paragraph 14, page 3 of the Complaint is granted. No opposition filed. The motion was previously continued from September 23, 2013 to October 23, 2013 for lack of courtesy copies of the moving papers as required by Local Rule 6.2B. The matter was then taken off calendar on October 23, 2013 for non-compliance with the Court's order to provide a courtesy copy of the moving papers. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-07-2013 Continued To Jan-08-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Claim, Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Oct-23-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT RODRICK FOODS, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE CLAIM.

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Off calendar. The Court previously continued this matter from September 23, 2013, and ordered the moving party to provide a courtesy copy of the motion in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The matter is off calendar because the moving party failed to comply with the Court's order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR #6185 (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Claim, Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Sep-23-2013 Continued To Oct-23-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT RODRICK FOODS, INCORPORATED'S Motion To Strike Claim, Points And Authorities
is continued to October 23, 2013 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than September 23, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has a courtesy copy of the proposed order only. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/LCN)
